tools.name: budget_get_status
tools.description: Returns the current Azure infrastructure spend for this month, including total spend to date, daily velocity, projected month-end cost, and a comparison against the previous month. Use this when the user asks about costs, spend, burn rate, or how much HelkinSwarm has cost so far.
useWhen: the user asks how much HelkinSwarm is costing
the user wants to check current Azure spend or burn rate
the user asks about daily or monthly budget status
avoidWhen: the user is asking about a model's per-token pricing — use budget_estimate_tokens instead
tools.returnsSummaryShape: object with currentMonthSpend, dailyVelocity, projectedMonthEnd, currency, and model rate table

tools.name: budget_estimate_tokens
tools.description: Estimates how many tokens and conversational turns a given dollar budget buys for a specific model. Also returns the per-million-token rate for the model. Use when the user asks how far a budget will go, how much a certain number of turns costs, or wants to compare model pricing.

model.description: Optional model to price against. Defaults to the current primary model (grok-4.1-fast). Examples: 'grok-4.1-fast', 'o4-mini', 'gpt-5'.

mode.description: Token mode to price: 'input' (prompt tokens only), 'output' (completion only), 'blended' (mixed average). Default: 'blended'.

aliases: how much does a turn cost
discoveryTerms: how far will my budget go
useWhen: the user wants to know how many turns or tokens a fixed dollar budget covers
the user wants to compare model pricing
the user wants to set a token ceiling for a given spend target
avoidWhen: the user wants their actual current Azure spend — use budget_get_status instead
tools.returnsSummaryShape: object with estimated_total_tokens, estimated_turns, rate_per_million_tokens, model, and mode

shortDescription: Azure infrastructure spend tracking, per-model pricing lookup, and dollar-to-token budget translation
